case_title: EDITH ARELY SOLORZANO VS. JESUS AHUMADA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. SONIA MONTEMONTENEGRO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLORZANO, EDITH ARELY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHUMADA, JESUS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SOLORZANO, EDITH ARELY C/O SONIA MONTENEGRO,SEE AUTH. LETTER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SOLORZANO, EDITH ARELY AS TO DEFENDANT AHUMADA, JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
